regional_cost_note: Quantity surveyors in Gisborne typically charge $2,200–$9,000 for a construction cost estimate and 1–3% of construction cost for contract administration. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. A QS is most valuable on projects over $200,000 — they typically save more than their fee through better cost control and contract management.
